title: Eindhoven, North Brabant — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Eindhoven, North Brabant: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Eindhoven is a city in North Brabant with a population of 246,417. The Netherlands’ technology and design capital, home to Philips and ASML, offering a modern, innovative environment with relatively affordable housing.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
